subject: Possible GRB 20030105 seen by SPI ACS
body:
The ISDC shift team reports:

A possible GRB has been seen in the INTEGRAL SPI-ACS light curve on
2003-01-05 at
14:34:12  UT.
The duration of the burst is 1.5 sec. No position information is
available.
The light curve is available at:
ftp://isdcarc.unige.ch/arc/FTP/ibas/spiacs/2003-01-05T14:34:12.0000-00000-00000-0.lc
